events.title: Coffee & Community at Lakeside St. ☕
events.description:
Come join the first meetup for 608 Social Club (20s & 30s)!

This group is all about creating a space where people in their 20s and 30s can meet new people and build real community through low-key hangouts.

For our first meetup, we’ll keep it simple with coffee and conversation. Feel free to stop by, grab a drink, and hang out for a bit. Whether you’re new to Madison or have lived here a while and just want to meet more people, you’re welcome.

I’ll grab a table when I get there. Feel free t...

events.title: 🥞 🌈✨ Optional: Drag Bingo + Brunch | 608 Social Club (20s & 30s)
events.description:
For anyone in the mood for something fun and a little more high-energy, there’s a drag bingo + brunch happening at Merchant!

Miss Bianca Lynn Breeze is bringing bingo, performances, and a full show, so it should be a really fun time. Whether you’re coming for the queens, the brunch, or just the vibes, this is a great option if you’re looking to mix things up 💖

Doors open at 11:00 AM and the show starts at 12:00 PM, so let’s plan to meet right when doors open to grab seats together.

🪩 **Tic...

events.title: 🍸✨ Chill Drinks + Meet New People | 608 Social Club (20s & 30s)
events.description:
If you’re in your 20s or 30s and looking to meet new people in Madison, come hang out for a relaxed drinks night.

This is a relaxed, social meetup with no pressure, no cliques, just good vibes and conversation. Come as you are, you’re welcome here 🤍

🍹 Come and go whenever
🤎 Most people will be coming solo

Whether you’re new or have been to an event before, it’s an easy space to show up and connect.

I’ll post what I’m wearing so you can find the group!

events.title: 🌿🤍 Arboretum Walk + Meet New People | 608 Social Club (20s & 30s)
events.description:
Join us for a relaxed walk and a chance to connect with new people in a welcoming, low key space.

We’ll walk about 2 miles at an easy pace and take time to chat along the way. Most people come solo, so you’re not the only one 🤍

🌿 Free to visit
👟 Wear comfortable closed toe shoes, trails may be muddy

If people are up for it, we can grab coffee or food after

There's more than just Mexican food too. With burgers, chicken, steak & fish, soups & salads, vegetarian options, appetizers & desserts there's bound to be something for everyone.

Menu: https://www.meandjuliorestaurant.com/menu-fitchburg

Not sure you can contribute in a game of trivia? Consider this. If you are able to answer even one question...

events.title: Think Fast Trivia @ VFW Post 1318 "The V"
events.description:
Join Team Random Facts for **Think Fast Trivia, Madison's best trivia experience**. 80 fast paced questions organized in 8 categories, multiple choice or fill in the blank, audio and visual rounds as well as verbal questions, and a final question where we can risk it all.

See the photo section for a preview of some of this week's categories, and for information about the upcoming ***$1000 trivia competition.***

VFW posts are not just for veterans. All are welcome, and "The V" is a typical b...

events.description: Join us at Madison After Dark Meetup Group's Cocktail Mix and Mingle Night to sip on delicious cocktails while making new friends . Our vibrant community of singles and social butterflies will create an inviting space for you to unwind and connect with like-minded individuals.

Sober or sober curious women

Casual Brunch and/or coffee

Let's connect and make new friends!

Each person pays for their own lunch or coffee. :)

events.title: Back at That Coffee Place Inside that Feed Place
Album Club: The Beatles, Rubber Soul (1965)
events.description:
With pick #35 on the Top 100, we turn to an album that quietly changed the direction of popular music: *Rubber Soul* by The Beatles.

Released in 1965, *Rubber Soul* feels like the moment when The Beatles began moving beyond the bright rush of early Beatlemania into something deeper, stranger, and more introspective.

The songs still sparkle with melody, but the themes are more grown-up — questions about identity, love, independence, and the shifting culture of the mid-1960s.

A lot of people...

events.title: Movie Club: One Flew Over the Cuckoo's Nest (1975)
events.description:
Welcome to #33 on the Top 100, where we enter the locked wards of an Oregon psychiatric hospital and ask ourselves: who, exactly, is sane?

Directed by Miloš Forman and based on Ken Kesey's landmark novel, *One Flew Over the Cuckoo's Nest* is one of the most electrifying films ever made. Jack Nicholson plays Randle P. McMurphy, a fast-talking, rule-breaking force of nature who gets himself transferred to a mental institution to avoid hard labor, and proceeds to turn the whole place upside dow...
